subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Beauty of the All-Glorious! Thy letters were received, and their contents made known thy sorrow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم جمال مقصود مکاتیب شما رسید و بر کیفیت اطلاع حاصل گردید از حزن شما
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
